taskSpec.title: Task
taskSpec.summary:
Build a complete, production-ready website for a luxury African clothing brand called "KENTE & CO."

## Brand Identity
- Aesthetic: High-end, modern African luxury — think Bottega Veneta meets Ankara prints
- Tone: Confident, elegant, cultural pride without cliché
- Target audience: Affluent 25–45 year olds globally who appreciate heritage fashion
- Brand colors: Deep forest green (#1B3A2D), warm gold (#C9A84C), cream (#F5F0E8), charcoal (#2C2C2C)
- Typography feel: Editorial — a strong serif display font paired with clean sans-serif body

## Pages to Build
1. Homepage — hero with full-bleed campaign image, featured collections, brand story teaser, newsletter signup
2. Collections page — grid of products with filter by category (Women, Men, Accessories)
3. Single product page — image gallery, size selector, add to cart, related products
4. About page — brand story, founder section, craftsmanship values
5. Contact page — form with map placeholder

## Functional Requirements
- Fully responsive (mobile-first, works on 320px to 1440px)
- Sticky navigation with transparent-to-solid scroll behavior
- Smooth page transitions and scroll animations (intersection observer)
- Working shopping cart (localStorage, quantity controls, subtotal)
- Image lazy loading
- Accessible — WCAG AA compliant, keyboard navigable, ARIA labels

## Technical Stack
- Vanilla HTML + CSS + JavaScript only (no frameworks, no build tools)
- Single self-contained HTML file
- Use Unsplash images (free, no auth) for all photography
- Google Fonts for typography
- No placeholder grey boxes — use real stock photography

## Content to Include
- realistic product listings with names, prices in USD, and descriptions
- Real-looking navigation: Home, Collections, About, Our Craft, Contact
- Footer with social links, newsletter input, payment method icons, copyright
- "As seen in" press logos section (Vogue Africa, CNN Style, Forbes Africa)

## Code Quality
- Clean semantic HTML5 (header, main, section, article, footer)
- CSS custom properties for all brand tokens
- No inline styles except for dynamic JS-driven values
- Commented sections for easy editing
- Fast — no render-blocking resources

## Preview Requirement
The final output must render correctly as a live preview in a browser iframe. 
All assets must be external CDN links or Unsplash URLs — no local file dependencies.

results.query: CSS scroll behavior sticky navigation transparent solid
results.title: Sticky Navigation with Transparent-to-Solid Scroll Effect
results.summary: Position sticky can create navigation that stays fixed at a certain scroll position. For transparent-to-solid transition effects, JavaScript is typically needed to add/remove classes based on scroll position, combined with CSS transitions for smooth background color changes.
key_insights: Use position: sticky with top: 0 to stick navigation to viewport top
CSS transition: background-color 0.2s linear enables smooth color changes
Add .solid-nav class via JavaScript on scroll to toggle background
position: sticky requires at least one of top/right/bottom/left to be specified
Avoid overflow: hidden on parent elements as it breaks sticky behavior
results.implementation_notes: Create a nav-container with position: fixed, transparent background, and use JavaScript scroll listener to add a 'solid-nav' class that sets background-color. Use CSS transitions for smooth effect. Example: .nav-container { transition: background-color 0.2s linear; } .nav-container.solid-nav { background-color: #1B3A2D; }

results.title: Intersection Observer API for Scroll Animations
results.summary: The Intersection Observer API provides an asynchronous way to detect when elements enter or leave the viewport, making it ideal for scroll-triggered animations. It's more performant than scroll event listeners as it doesn't block the main thread.
key_insights: IntersectionObserver is asynchronous and more performant than scroll listeners
Use threshold option (0-1) to control when callback fires based on visibility percentage
entry.isIntersecting returns true when element enters viewport
Add/remove CSS classes to trigger animations rather than inline styles
Use animation-play-state: paused initially, then switch to running on intersection
results.implementation_notes: Create observer with: const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => { entries.forEach(entry => { if (entry.isIntersecting) entry.target.classList.add('visible'); }); }, { threshold: 0.1 }); Then observe elements: document.querySelectorAll('.animate').forEach(el => observer.observe(el)); Use CSS: .animate { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(20px); transition: all 0.6s; } .animate.visible { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }

results.title: Building a Shopping Cart with localStorage
results.summary: localStorage provides persistent browser storage for shopping cart data that survives page refreshes. Cart items are stored as JSON strings and parsed back to arrays for manipulation, with key operations including add, remove, quantity update, and total calculation.
key_insights: Use JSON.stringify() to save cart array and JSON.parse() to retrieve
Pattern: let cart = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('cart')) || [] prevents null errors
Store product objects with id, name, price, and quantity properties
Update localStorage after every cart modification
localStorage.removeItem('cart') clears the entire cart
results.implementation_notes: Core functions: saveCart() { localStorage.setItem('cart', JSON.stringify(cart)); } getCart() { return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('cart')) || []; } addToCart(product) { cart.push(product); saveCart(); } updateQuantity(id, delta) { item.quantity += delta; if (item.quantity <= 0) remove(id); saveCart(); } calculateTotal() { return cart.reduce((sum, item) => sum + (item.price * item.quantity), 0); }

results.query: WCAG AA accessibility checklist web development
results.title: WCAG 2.1/2.2 AA Accessibility Compliance Checklist
results.summary: WCAG AA compliance requires meeting accessibility success criteria covering perceivable, operable, understandable, and robust principles. Key requirements include proper alt text, keyboard navigation, sufficient color contrast, form labels, and ARIA usage.
key_insights: All images need appropriate alt text; decorative images use alt=""
Minimum color contrast ratio of 4.5:1 for normal text, 3:1 for large text
All interactive elements must be keyboard accessible
Use semantic HTML (header, nav, main, footer) and ARIA landmarks
Form inputs must have associated labels; error messages must be accessible
Provide skip link for keyboard users to bypass navigation
results.implementation_notes: Implementation checklist: 1) Add lang attribute to <html>; 2) Use semantic elements (header, nav, main, section, article, footer); 3) All images have alt text; 4) All form inputs have <label> with for attribute; 5) Links have descriptive text; 6) Color contrast meets 4.5:1 ratio; 7) All functionality available via keyboard; 8) Focus styles are visible; 9) ARIA labels on interactive elements; 10) Skip to main content link

results.query: Google Fonts editorial serif sans-serif pairing
results.title: Editorial Font Pairings for Luxury E-commerce
results.summary: For an editorial, high-end aesthetic, pair a dramatic high-contrast serif display font for headlines with a clean humanist sans-serif for body text. Popular editorial pairings include Playfair Display with Lato, Libre Baskerville with Montserrat, or Cormorant Garamond with Raleway.
key_insights: Playfair Display: high-contrast serif with elegant curves, ideal for luxury headlines
Libre Baskerville: crisp editorial quality, refined serifs perfect for sophisticated brands
Lato: versatile humanist sans-serif, excellent readability at small sizes
Cormorant Garamond: high contrast and elegance, feels modern and editorial
Contrast serif + sans-serif creates visual hierarchy while maintaining readability
Limit to 2 fonts maximum for cohesive brand appearance
results.implementation_notes: Recommended pairings for luxury African fashion brand: Option 1: Playfair Display (headlines) + Lato (body) - classic editorial; Option 2: Cormorant Garamond (headlines) + Raleway (body) - sophisticated luxury; Option 3: Libre Baskerville (headlines) + Montserrat (body) - elegant boutique. CSS: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:wght@400;700&family=Lato:wght@300;400;700&display=swap');

knowledgeSummary.executive_summary: Building a luxury African fashion e-commerce site requires combining sticky navigation with scroll-triggered transparency effects, Intersection Observer for performant scroll animations, localStorage-based cart persistence, WCAG AA accessibility compliance, and editorial font pairings that convey high-end aesthetics.
key_concepts: Intersection Observer API: Asynchronous, performant alternative to scroll listeners for detecting element visibility
localStorage persistence: JSON-based browser storage that survives page refreshes for cart data
WCAG AA compliance: Accessibility standard requiring 4.5:1 contrast ratio, keyboard navigation, semantic HTML
Editorial typography: High-contrast serif headlines paired with humanist sans-serif body text for luxury aesthetic
CSS transitions: Smooth property animations triggered by class toggling on scroll events
implementation_guide: Set up Google Fonts with Playfair Display (headlines) + Lato (body) for editorial luxury feel
Create fixed navigation with transparent background and CSS transition on background-color
Implement scroll listener OR Intersection Observer to toggle .solid-nav class for header transition
Set up Intersection Observer for .animate elements with threshold: 0.1 to trigger fade-in animations
Build cart module with localStorage: getCart(), saveCart(), addToCart(), updateQuantity(), calculateTotal()
Add semantic HTML structure (header, nav, main, footer) with ARIA landmarks
Implement skip-to-main-content link and ensure all interactive elements are keyboard accessible
Verify color contrast ratios meet 4.5:1 minimum using contrast checker tools
apis_and_functions: IntersectionObserver(callback, {threshold}): Observes element visibility changes asynchronously
observer.observe(element): Registers element for intersection tracking
entry.isIntersecting: Boolean indicating if observed element is in viewport
localStorage.setItem(key, JSON.stringify(data)): Persists cart array as JSON string
JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(key)) || []: Safely retrieves cart with empty array fallback
cart.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.price * item.quantity, 0): Calculates cart total
element.classList.add/remove('class'): Toggles animation and state classes
pitfalls: overflow:hidden on parent breaks position:sticky - use overflow:visible or restructure DOM
localStorage.getItem returns null not empty array - always use || [] fallback pattern
Scroll listeners block main thread - prefer Intersection Observer for animations
position:sticky requires top/right/bottom/left value - always specify top:0 for nav
Decorative images need alt='' not missing alt - screen readers handle these differently
Cart quantity can go negative - check quantity <= 0 and remove item automatically
code_patterns: Observer setup: new IntersectionObserver(entries => entries.forEach(e => e.isIntersecting && e.target.classList.add('visible')), {threshold: 0.1})
Scroll transition CSS: .nav { transition: background-color 0.2s linear; } .nav.solid { background-color: #1B3A2D; }
Fade-in animation: .animate { opacity:0; transform:translateY(20px); transition:all 0.6s; } .animate.visible { opacity:1; transform:translateY(0); }

# Implementation Plan for KENTE & CO. Luxury African Fashion E-commerce Website

## Overview
This plan creates a single-file HTML website for a luxury African fashion brand with full e-commerce functionality using vanilla HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.

## Files to Create
- **index.html** - Single self-contained file with all HTML, CSS, and JavaScript

## Detailed Implementation Steps

### **Step 1: Document Foundation & Brand System**
**Files:** `index.html`
**Dependencies:** None

Create the HTML5 document structure with:
- DOCTYPE and responsive meta tags
- Google Fonts imports (Playfair Display serif + Lato sans-serif)
- CSS custom properties for brand colors:
  ```css
  --forest-green: #1B3A2D;
  --warm-gold: #C9A84C;
  --cream: #F5F0E8;
  --charcoal: #2C2C2C;
  ```
- Base typography scale and spacing system
- Mobile-first breakpoint variables

**Risk:** Font loading blocking render
**Mitigation:** Use font-display: swap; preconnect to fonts.googleapis.com

### **Step 2: Sticky Navigation Component**
**Files:** `index.html` (header element)
**Dependencies:** Step 1

Build navigation with:
- Logo "KENTE & CO." in brand typography
- Menu items: Home, Collections, About, Our Craft, Contact
- Cart icon with quantity badge
- Mobile hamburger menu with slide-out drawer
- Transparent background with CSS transition on scroll

**Key CSS:**
```css
header {
  position: sticky;
  top: 0;
  z-index: 1000;
  transition: background-color 0.3s ease;
}
```

**Risk:** position:sticky breaks with overflow:hidden parent
**Mitigation:** Ensure parent elements use overflow:visible

### **Step 3: Homepage Hero & Content**
**Files:** `index.html` (main section)
**Dependencies:** Step 2

Create homepage sections:
- Full-bleed hero with Unsplash campaign image
- H1 headline with brand messaging
- Featured collections grid (3 items with hover effects)
- Brand story teaser with founder image
- "As seen in" press logos (Vogue Africa, CNN Style, Forbes Africa)
- Newsletter signup form

**Unsplash URLs to integrate:**
- Hero: `https://source.unsplash.com/1600x900/?african,fashion,luxury`
- Collections: `https://source.unsplash.com/800x600/?kente,clothing`

### **Step 4: Collections Page with Filtering**
**Files:** `index.html` (section#collections)
**Dependencies:** Step 1

Build product catalog:
- Category filter tabs (All, Women, Men, Accessories)
- Product grid with 12+ items
- Product cards: image, name, price, quick view button
- Filter functionality using data attributes
- Responsive grid (1-2-3-4 column layout)

**JavaScript filter function:**
```javascript
function filterProducts(category) {
  const products = document.querySelectorAll('[data-category]');
  products.forEach(product => {
    product.style.display = 
      category === 'all' || product.dataset.category === category 
      ? 'block' : 'none';
  });
}
```

### **Step 5: Product Detail Page**
**Files:** `index.html` (section#product-detail)  
**Dependencies:** Step 4

Create product page with:
- Main product image with thumbnail gallery
- Product title, price, description
- Size selector dropdown
- Quantity input with +/- buttons
- "Add to Cart" button
- Related products carousel
- Product data structure in JavaScript

### **Step 6: About Page Content**
**Files:** `index.html` (section#about)
**Dependencies:** Step 1

Build brand story page:
- Hero section with brand narrative
- Founder bio with portrait
- Craftsmanship values grid with icons
- Full-width image break
- Mission statement

### **Step 7: Contact Page & Form**
**Files:** `index.html` (section#contact)
**Dependencies:** Step 1

Create contact section:
- Contact form with validation (name, email, subject, message)
- Business information sidebar
- Map placeholder image
- Form submission handling (preventDefault + success message)

### **Step 8: Footer Component**
**Files:** `index.html` (footer element)
**Dependencies:** Step 1

Build comprehensive footer:
- 4-column responsive layout
- Links: About, Shop, Customer Care, Connect
- Newsletter signup
- Social media icons (SVG)
- Payment method icons
- Copyright text

### **Step 9: Shopping Cart Functionality**
**Files:** `index.html` (JavaScript section)
**Dependencies:** Step 5

Implement cart system:
```javascript
// Core cart functions
const cart = {
  items: JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('kenteCart')) || [],
  
  add(product, quantity = 1) {
    // Add item or update quantity
  },
  
  remove(productId) {
    // Remove item from cart
  },
  
  update(productId, quantity) {
    // Update item quantity
  },
  
  getTotal() {
    // Calculate subtotal
  },
  
  save() {
    localStorage.setItem('kenteCart', JSON.stringify(this.items));
  }
};
```

**Risk:** localStorage returns null on first visit
**Mitigation:** Use `|| []` fallback pattern consistently

### **Step 10: Scroll Animations (Intersection Observer)**
**Files:** `index.html` (JavaScript section)
**Dependencies:** Steps 3-7

Add scroll-triggered animations:
```javascript
const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
  entries.forEach(entry => {
    if (entry.isIntersecting) {
      entry.target.classList.add('animate-in');
    }
  });
}, { threshold: 0.1 });

// Observe all .animate elements
document.querySelectorAll('.animate').forEach(el => {
  observer.observe(el);
});
```

**Risk:** Scroll listeners block main thread
**Mitigation:** Use Intersection Observer exclusively

### **Step 11: Single Page Navigation**
**Files:** `index.html` (JavaScript section)
**Dependencies:** Steps 2, 10

Implement smooth page transitions:
- Hash-based routing (#home, #collections, etc.)
- Smooth scroll to sections
- Navigation state updates
- Browser history support

### **Step 12: Lazy Loading & Performance**
**Files:** `index.html` (img elements + JavaScript)
**Dependencies:** Steps 3-6

Add image optimization:
- `loading="lazy"` attribute on all images
- Intersection Observer fallback for older browsers
- Progressive image loading with blur-up effect
- Optimize Unsplash URLs with size parameters

### **Step 13: Responsive Design Implementation**
**Files:** `index.html` (CSS media queries)
**Dependencies:** Steps 2-8

Create breakpoint-specific styles:
- 320px: Single column, stacked navigation
- 480px: Two-column product grid
- 768px: Three-column grid, horizontal navigation
- 1024px: Four-column grid, expanded content
- 1440px: Maximum width container, optimal spacing

**Risk:** Layout breaks at edge cases
**Mitigation:** Test at exactly 320px, 479px, 767px boundaries

### **Step 14: Accessibility Implementation**
**Files:** `index.html` (throughout)
**Dependencies:** Steps 9, 11

Add WCAG AA compliance:
- Skip-to-main-content link
- Focus indicators with 4.5:1 contrast
- ARIA labels on interactive elements
- Live regions for cart updates
- Keyboard navigation for all features
- Semantic heading hierarchy (h1 → h2 → h3)

**Color contrast verification required:**
- Text on cream background: 4.5:1 minimum
- Button states and focus indicators
- Use online contrast checker tools

### **Step 15: Final Integration & Testing**
**Files:** `index.html` (code organization)
**Dependencies:** Steps 12-14

Complete final optimization:
- Add section comments throughout HTML
- Organize CSS by component sections
- Minify repeated code patterns
- Validate HTML5 compliance
- Test all interactive features
- Verify iframe preview compatibility
- Remove any external dependencies

## Potential Risks & Mitigations

1. **Single File Size**: Large HTML file may impact loading
   - **Mitigation**: Optimize images via Unsplash parameters, minify where possible

2. **localStorage Browser Support**: IE limitations
   - **Mitigation**: Feature detection with try/catch wrapper

3. **Sticky Navigation Issues**: CSS sticky not supported everywhere
   - **Mitigation**: Fallback to fixed positioning for older browsers

4. **Image Loading Performance**: Multiple Unsplash requests
   - **Mitigation**: Use specific dimensions and lazy loading

## Success Criteria Validation
- [ ] Renders in iframe without external dependencies
- [ ] All 5 sections navigable and functional
- [ ] Cart persists across refreshes
- [ ] Mobile responsive down to 320px
- [ ] WCAG AA accessibility compliance verified
- [ ] All animations smooth on 60fps devices
- [ ] No console errors in major browsers

This implementation plan creates a production-ready luxury fashion website that meets all requirements while maintaining performance and accessibility standards.

step.description:
Build a complete, production-ready website for a luxury African clothing brand called "KENTE & CO."

## Brand Identity
- Aesthetic: High-end, modern African luxury — think Bottega Veneta meets Ankara prints
- Tone: Confident, elegant, cultural pride without cliché
- Target audience: Affluent 25–45 year olds globally who appreciate heritage fashion
- Brand colors: Deep forest green (#1B3A2D), warm gold (#C9A84C), cream (#F5F0E8), charcoal (#2C2C2C)
- Typography feel: Editorial — a strong serif display font paired with clean sans-serif body

## Pages to Build
1. Homepage — hero with full-bleed campaign image, featured collections, brand story teaser, newsletter signup
2. Collections page — grid of products with filter by category (Women, Men, Accessories)
3. Single product page — image gallery, size selector, add to cart, related products
4. About page — brand story, founder section, craftsmanship values
5. Contact page — form with map placeholder

## Functional Requirements
- Fully responsive (mobile-first, works on 320px to 1440px)
- Sticky navigation with transparent-to-solid scroll behavior
- Smooth page transitions and scroll animations (intersection observer)
- Working shopping cart (localStorage, quantity controls, subtotal)
- Image lazy loading
- Accessible — WCAG AA compliant, keyboard navigable, ARIA labels

## Technical Stack
- Vanilla HTML + CSS + JavaScript only (no frameworks, no build tools)
- Single self-contained HTML file
- Use Unsplash images (free, no auth) for all photography
- Google Fonts for typography
- No placeholder grey boxes — use real stock photography

## Content to Include
- realistic product listings with names, prices in USD, and descriptions
- Real-looking navigation: Home, Collections, About, Our Craft, Contact
- Footer with social links, newsletter input, payment method icons, copyright
- "As seen in" press logos section (Vogue Africa, CNN Style, Forbes Africa)

## Code Quality
- Clean semantic HTML5 (header, main, section, article, footer)
- CSS custom properties for all brand tokens
- No inline styles except for dynamic JS-driven values
- Commented sections for easy editing
- Fast — no render-blocking resources

## Preview Requirement
The final output must render correctly as a live preview in a browser iframe. 
All assets must be external CDN links or Unsplash URLs — no local file dependencies.

<!DOCTYPE html>

<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>KENTE & CO. - Luxury African Fashion</title>
    <meta name="description" content="Discover luxury African fashion that celebrates heritage with modern sophistication. Shop premium collections by KENTE & CO.">
    
    <!-- Google Fonts -->
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">

    <style>
        /* ============ CSS CUSTOM PROPERTIES ============ */
        :root {
            --forest-green: #1B3A2D;
            --warm-gold: #C9A84C;
            --cream: #F5F0E8;
            --charcoal: #2C2C2C;
            --white: #FFFFFF;
            --light-gray: #F8F8F8;
            --medium-gray: #666666;
            --dark-gray: #333333;
            
            /* Typography */
            --font-serif: 'Playfair Display', serif;
            --font-sans: 'Lato', sans-serif;
            
            /* Spacing */
            --space-xs: 0.5rem;
            --space-sm: 1rem;
            --space-md: 1.5rem;
            --space-lg: 2rem;
            --space-xl: 3rem;
            --space-2xl: 4rem;
            
            /* Container */
            --container-max: 1440px;
            --container-padding: 1rem;
            
            /* Transitions */
            --transition-fast: 0.2s ease;
            --transition-normal: 0.3s ease;
            --transition-slow: 0.5s ease;
        }
        
        /* ============ RESET & BASE STYLES ============ */
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        
        html {
            scroll-behavior: smooth;
            font-size: 16px;
        }
        
        body {
            font-family: var(--font-sans);
            font-weight: 400;
            line-height: 1.6;
            color: var(--charcoal);
            background-color: var(--cream);
        }
        
        /* ============ TYPOGRAPHY ============ */
        h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6 {
            font-family: var(--font-serif);
            font-weight: 600;
            line-height: 1.2;
            margin-bottom: var(--space-sm);
        }
        
        h1 { font-size: clamp(2.5rem, 5vw, 4rem); }
        h2 { font-size: clamp(2rem, 4vw, 3rem); }
        h3 { font-size: clamp(1.5rem, 3vw, 2rem); }
        h4 { font-size: 1.25rem; }
        h5 { font-size: 1.125rem; }
        h6 { font-size: 1rem; }
        
        p {
            margin-bottom: var(--space-sm);
            font-size: 1rem;
            line-height: 1.7;
        }
        
        a {
            text-decoration: none;
            color: inherit;
            transition: color var(--transition-fast);
        }
        
        a:hover {
            color: var(--warm-gold);
        }
        
        /* ============ UTILITY CLASSES ============ */
        .container {
            max-width: var(--container-max);
            margin: 0 auto;
            padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
        }
        
        .visually-hidden {
            position: absolute;
            width: 1px;
            height: 1px;
            padding: 0;
            margin: -1px;
            overflow: hidden;
            clip: rect(0, 0, 0, 0);
            white-space: nowrap;
            border: 0;
        }
        
        .skip-link {
            position: absolute;
            top: -40px;
            left: 6px;
            background: var(--forest-green);
            color: var(--white);
            padding: 8px;
            text-decoration: none;
            z-index: 10000;
            border-radius: 4px;
        }
        
        .skip-link:focus {
            top: 6px;
        }
        
        .animate {
            opacity: 0;
            transform: translateY(30px);
            transition: opacity 0.6s ease, transform 0.6s ease;
        }
        
        .animate.animate-in {
            opacity: 1;
            transform: translateY(0);
        }
        
        .btn {
            display: inline-block;
            padding: var(--space-sm) var(--space-lg);
            font-family: var(--font-sans);
            font-weight: 500;
            text-align: center;
            border: 2px solid var(--forest-green);
            background: var(--forest-green);
            color: var(--white);
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all var(--transition-normal);
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.5px;
            font-size: 0.9rem;
            border-radius: 0;
        }
        
        .btn:hover, .btn:focus {
            background: transparent;
            color: var(--forest-green);
            outline: none;
            box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(27, 58, 45, 0.2);
        }
        
        .btn-secondary {
            background: transparent;
            color: var(--forest-green);
            border-color: var(--forest-green);
        }
        
        .btn-secondary:hover, .btn-secondary:focus {
            background: var(--forest-green);
            color: var(--white);
        }
        
        .btn-gold {
            background: var(--warm-gold);
            border-color: var(--warm-gold);
            color: var(--white);
        }
        
        .btn-gold:hover, .btn-gold:focus {
            background: transparent;
            color: var(--warm-gold);
            border-color: var(--warm-gold);
        }
        
        /* ============ HEADER & NAVIGATION ============ */
        header {
            position: sticky;
            top: 0;
            z-index: 1000;
            background: rgba(245, 240, 232, 0.95);
            backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
            border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(27, 58, 45, 0.1);
            transition: all var(--transition-normal);
        }
        
        .navbar {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: space-between;
            padding: var(--space-md) 0;
            min-height: 80px;
        }
        
        .logo {
            font-family: var(--font-serif);
            font-size: 1.5rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: var(--forest-green);
            letter-spacing: 1px;
        }
        
        .nav-links {
            display: flex;
            list-style: none;
            gap: var(--space-lg);
        }
        
        .nav-links a {
            font-weight: 500;
            color: var(--charcoal);
            font-size: 0.95rem;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.5px;
            position: relative;
        }
        
        .nav-links a::after {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            bottom: -5px;
            left: 0;
            width: 0;
            height: 2px;
            background: var(--warm-gold);
            transition: width var(--transition-normal);
        }
        
        .nav-links a:hover::after, .nav-links a.active::after {
            width: 100%;
        }
        
        .nav-actions {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: var(--space-md);
        }
        
        .cart-btn {
            position: relative;
            background: none;
            border: none;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-size: 1.2rem;
            color: var(--forest-green);
            padding: var(--space-xs);
        }
        
        .cart-count {
            position: absolute;
            top: -5px;
            right: -5px;
            background: var(--warm-gold);
            color: var(--white);
            border-radius: 50%;
            width: 20px;
            height: 20px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            font-size: 0.75rem;
            font-weight: 600;
        }
        
        .mobile-menu-btn {
            background: none;
            border: none;
            cursor: pointer;
            padding: var(--space-xs);
            color: var(--forest-green);
            display: none;
        }
        
        /* ============ HERO SECTION ============ */
        .hero {
            height: 100vh;
            position: relative;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            text-align: center;
            background: linear-gradient(rgba(27, 58, 45, 0.4), rgba(27, 58, 45, 0.4)), url('https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1594736797933-d0501ba2fe65?w=1600&q=80') center/cover;
        }
        
        .hero-content {
            color: var(--white);
            max-width: 600px;
        }
        
        .hero h1 {
            margin-bottom: var(--space-md);
            text-shadow: 2px 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
        }
        
        .hero p {
            font-size: 1.2rem;
            margin-bottom: var(--space-xl);
            opacity: 0.9;
        }
        
        /* ============ SECTIONS ============ */
        section {
            padding: var(--space-2xl) 0;
        }
        
        .section-header {
            text-align: center;
            margin-bottom: var(--space-2xl);
        }
        
        .section-header h2 {
            color: var(--forest-green);
            margin-bottom: var(--space-md);
        }
        
        .section-header p {
            font-size: 1.1rem;
            color: var(--medium-gray);
            max-width: 600px;
            margin: 0 auto;
        }
        
        /* ============ COLLECTIONS GRID ============ */
        .collections-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(300px, 1fr));
            gap: var(--space-xl);
            margin-bottom: var(--space-2xl);
        }
        
        .collection-card {
            position: relative;
            height: 500px;
            overflow: hidden;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: transform var(--transition-normal);
        }
        
        .collection-card:hover {
            transform: scale(1.02);
        }
        
        .collection-card img {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            object-fit: cover;
            transition: transform var(--transition-slow);
        }
        
        .collection-card:hover img {
            transform: scale(1.1);
        }
        
        .collection-overlay {
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 0;
            left: 0;
            right: 0;
            background: linear-gradient(transparent, rgba(27, 58, 45, 0.8));
            color: var(--white);
            padding: var(--space-xl) var(--space-lg);
        }
        
        .collection-overlay h3 {
            margin-bottom: var(--space-xs);
        }
        
        /* ============ PRODUCT GRID ============ */
        .products-filter {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            gap: var(--space-md);
            margin-bottom: var(--space-2xl);
            flex-wrap: wrap;
        }
        
        .filter-btn {
            padding: var(--space-xs) var(--space-md);
            background: transparent;
            border: 1px solid var(--forest-green);
            color: var(--forest-green);
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all var(--transition-normal);
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.5px;
            font-size: 0.9rem;
        }
        
        .filter-btn:hover, .filter-btn.active {
            background: var(--forest-green);
            color: var(--white);
        }
        
        .products-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr));
            gap: var(--space-xl);
        }
        
        .product-card {
            background: var(--white);
            overflow: hidden;
            transition: transform var(--transition-normal), box-shadow var(--transition-normal);
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        
        .product-card:hover {
            transform: translateY(-5px);
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
        }
        
        .product-image {
            position: relative;
            height: 300px;
            overflow: hidden;
        }
        
        .product-image img {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            object-fit: cover;
            transition: transform var(--transition-slow);
        }
        
        .product-card:hover .product-image img {
            transform: scale(1.1);
        }
        
        .product-info {
            padding: var(--space-md);
        }
        
        .product-title {
            font-family: var(--font-serif);
            font-size: 1.1rem;
            margin-bottom: var(--space-xs);
            color: var(--forest-green);
        }
        
        .product-price {
            font-weight: 600;
            color: var(--warm-gold);
            font-size: 1.1rem;
        }
        
        .quick-add {
            position: absolute;
            bottom: var(--space-md);
            right: var(--space-md);
            background: var(--warm-gold);
            color: var(--white);
            border: none;
            width: 40px;
            height: 40px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-size: 1.2rem;
            opacity: 0;
            transform: translateY(20px);
            transition: all var(--transition-normal);
        }
        
        .product-card:hover .quick-add {
            opacity: 1;
            transform: translateY(0);
        }
        
        /* ============ BRAND STORY SECTION ============ */
        .brand-story {
            background: var(--white);
        }
        
        .story-content {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
            gap: var(--space-2xl);
            align-items: center;
        }
        
        .story-text h2 {
            color: var(--forest-green);
            margin-bottom: var(--space-md);
        }
        
        .story-text p {
            color: var(--medium-gray);
            font-size: 1.1rem;
            margin-bottom: var(--space-md);
        }
        
        .story-image img {
            width: 100%;
            height: 400px;
            object-fit: cover;
        }
        
        /* ============ PRESS SECTION ============ */
        .press {
            background: var(--forest-green);
            color: var(--white);
            text-align: center;
        }
        
        .press h2 {
            color: var(--white);
            margin-bottom: var(--space-xl);
        }
        
        .press-logos {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            gap: var(--space-xl);
            flex-wrap: wrap;
        }
        
        .press-logo {
            font-family: var(--font-serif);
            font-size: 1.5rem;
            font-weight: 600;
            color: var(--warm-gold);
            opacity: 0.8;
            transition: opacity var(--transition-normal);
        }
        
        .press-logo:hover {
            opacity: 1;
        }
        
        /* ============ NEWSLETTER SECTION ============ */
        .newsletter {
            background: var(--cream);
            text-align: center;
        }
        
        .newsletter-form {
            max-width: 400px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            display: flex;
            gap: var(--space-sm);
        }
        
        .newsletter-input {
            flex: 1;
            padding: var(--space-sm);
            border: 1px solid var(--medium-gray);
            font-family: var(--font-sans);
            font-size: 1rem;
            background: var(--white);
        }
        
        .newsletter-input:focus {
            outline: none;
            border-color: var(--forest-green);
        }
        
        /* ============ FOOTER ============ */
        footer {
            background: var(--charcoal);
            color: var(--white);
            padding: var(--space-2xl) 0 var(--space-lg);
        }
        
        .footer-content {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(250px, 1fr));
            gap: var(--space-xl);
            margin-bottom: var(--space-xl);
        }
        
        .footer-section h4 {
            color: var(--warm-gold);
            margin-bottom: var(--space-md);
        }
        
        .footer-section ul {
            list-style: none;
        }
        
        .footer-section ul li {
            margin-bottom: var(--space-xs);
        }
        
        .footer-section ul li a {
            color: var(--light-gray);
            transition: color var(--transition-fast);
        }
        
        .footer-section ul li a:hover {
            color: var(--warm-gold);
        }
        
        .social-links {
            display: flex;
            gap: var(--space-md);
            margin-top: var(--space-md);
        }
        
        .social-links a {
            color: var(--light-gray);
            font-size: 1.2rem;
            transition: color var(--transition-fast);
        }
        
        .social-links a:hover {
            color: var(--warm-gold);
        }
        
        .footer-bottom {
            border-top: 1px solid var(--dark-gray);
            padding-top: var(--space-lg);
            text-align: center;
            color: var(--medium-gray);
            font-size: 0.9rem;
        }
        
        /* ============ CART MODAL ============ */
        .cart-modal {
            position: fixed;
            top: 0;
            right: -400px;
            width: 400px;
            height: 100vh;
            background: var(--white);
            box-shadow: -5px 0 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
            transition: right var(--transition-normal);
            z-index: 1002;
            padding: var(--space-lg);
            overflow-y: auto;
        }
        
        .cart-modal.active {
            right: 0;
        }
        
        .cart-header {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            margin-bottom: var(--space-lg);
            padding-bottom: var(--space-md);

        }
        
        .close-cart {

            border: none;

            cursor: pointer;
            color: var(--charcoal);

        .cart-items {

            gap: var(--space-md);
            padding: var(--space-md) 0;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--light-gray);
        }
        
        .cart-item img {
            width: 80px;
            height: 80px;
            object-fit: cover;
        }
        
        .cart-item-info {
            flex: 1;
        }
        
        .cart-item-title {

        }
        
        .cart-item-price {
            color: var(--warm-gold);
            font-weight: 600;
        }
        
        .quantity-controls {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: var(--space-xs);
            margin-top: var(--space-xs);
        }

            height: 30px;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-weight: 600;
        }

            padding: var(--space-md) 0;
            border-top: 2px solid var(--forest-green);
        }
        
        .total-amount {

            font-size: 1.5rem;
            color: var(--forest-green);
            font-weight: 600;
        }
        
        /* ============ WATERMARK ============ */
        .watermark {
            position: fixed;
            bottom: 20px;
            right: 20px;
            background: rgba(27, 58, 45, 0.9);
            color: var(--white);
            padding: 8px 12px;
            font-size: 0.75rem;
            border-radius: 20px;
            z-index: 1000;
            backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
        }
        
        /* ============ RESPONSIVE DESIGN ============ */
        @media (max-width: 768px) {
            :root {
                --container-padding: 1rem;
                --space-2xl: 3rem;
            }
            
            .nav-links {
                display: none;
            }
            
            .mobile-menu-btn {
                display: block;

                padding: var(--space-lg);
            }

                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            }

            }
            
            .cart-modal {
                width: 100vw;
